title: Futuristic Tech Pavilion for DataTech Solutions
description: DataTech Solutions approached Approach Media to design a two-storey exhibition stall for Electronica India 2024. The brief called for a high-tech aesthetic that communicated the brand's leadership in industrial automation and IoT. We delivered a 120 sqm double-deck structure featuring immersive product demonstration zones, a glass-walled meeting suite on the upper level, and a dramatic LED reception tower visible from across the hall.
design_brief: The client wanted to stand out in a crowded tech hall while maintaining premium brand positioning. Budget constraints required clever use of modular aluminium framing that could be reused across events. The double-deck needed to pass structural certification for Bharat Mandapam.
ai_summary: 120 sqm double-deck stall at Electronica India 2024, Bharat Mandapam New Delhi. Two-floor structure with glass upper-level meeting suite, LED reception tower, and IoT product demo zones. Modular aluminium frame with backlit acrylic panels. Won Best Stall Design award in the Technology category.
materials_used: Modular aluminium|Backlit acrylic|Tempered glass|LED strip lighting|Vinyl floor wraps
special_features: Double-deck structure|LED reception tower|Product demo pods|Glass meeting room|Interactive touchscreens

title: Nature-Inspired Pharma Booth for MediCure Labs
description: MediCure Labs needed a 54 sqm island stall for Pharma India 2024 that balanced clinical credibility with a warm, welcoming atmosphere. The design used a central canopy structure in brand green with curved product display walls, a comfortable consultation lounge, and an open-access product sampling station. Natural wood textures and indoor plants softened the technical feel.
design_brief: MediCure required an open-plan layout that encouraged visitor flow through the stall without bottlenecks. The brand palette was predominantly white and green, requiring high-gloss finishes that would still look premium under harsh exhibition lighting. FDA-compliant product display cases were mandatory for the sampling zone.
ai_summary: 54 sqm island booth for MediCure Labs at Pharma India 2024, Bombay Exhibition Centre Mumbai. Curved display walls in brand green and white, central canopy with fabric lighting, open consultation lounge, compliant product sampling station, and biophilic plant installations.
